__comment__: Pre-configured Grafana dashboard JSON for visualizing AyushBot
gateway and cloud metrics. Imported into Grafana on first boot.
- CPU usage (4 cores, line chart over time)
- RAM usage (gauge, threshold at 3 GB / 4 GB)
- CPU temperature (line chart, red line at 75°C throttle threshold)
- Triage requests per minute (rate counter, bar chart)
- End-to-end triage latency (p50, p95, p99 histogram)
- LLM inference latency (separate histogram for Phi-3 calls)
- MQTT queue depth (line chart, alert if > 100)
- Sensor data quality score (computed from motion artifact rate)
- Global model accuracy trend (line chart over FL rounds)
REFRESH RATE: 30 seconds (adjustable in Grafana UI)
This JSON is auto-provisioned into Grafana via the Grafana
